you.lineup_summary: Real GW38 XI (3-4-3): Raya; Gabriel, Gvardiol, Aina; Salah, Mbeumo, Rogers, Anderson; Bowen (C), Mateta, Wood. Captain already correct (Bowen). Two dead starters drag the score: Raya is benched at Arsenal (0 xPts) and Gabriel had season-ending surgery (OUT). Swapping Raya->Sels in goal is the only free, legal lineup fix and recovers the lost GK points.

gemini.critical_note: INVALID PLAN. Both armband picks are confirmed absent: Haaland (C) is UNAVAILABLE / omitted from the MCI squad, and Gabriel (VC) had season-ending surgery. The 85 xPts figure assumed a Haaland haul and is void. After the cascade, Gemini's effective captain falls to Bowen anyway — converging with Claude.

highest_leverage_action: Bench Raya and start Sels (NFO) as the only available, confirmed-starting GK. This is a free, zero-risk lineup fix that converts a guaranteed 0 from Raya into real points — the single biggest gain available with no transfer cost.
chip_verdict: HOLD / let the TC expire. Its only legal anchor (Bowen) clears the TC bar by just ~6.2 pts over a standard x2 captain, below the threshold, and Gemini's intended TC target (Haaland) would score zero. Bowen as a standard (x2) captain is the correct lower-variance play in a rotation-heavy finale.
verdict: Both engines land on Bowen (C) once Gemini's invalid Haaland armband cascades through its dead vice (Gabriel) — genuine HIGH-conviction agreement, and it matches the user's real captain. Claude's plan projects highest at 71 xPts because it fixes the lineup (Sels in goal, least-bad legal back three) where Gemini's 85 is a phantom built on an absent captain. The user already has the right captain; they only need the free Raya->Sels GK swap to capture Claude's edge.
summary: GW38 finale 3-way verdict: captain Bowen is unanimous and confirmed (Claude direct, Gemini after a double-absence cascade off Haaland/Gabriel, and the user's real armband). Consensus AGREE, conviction HIGH. Gemini's 85 xPts is void (absent captain); Claude's 71 is the best executable plan. Single highest-leverage action: bench Raya, start Sels in goal. Hold the TC chip and let it expire.
